prompt:
Industrial product DIELINE / unwrapped flat layout of the NuLumin Bio-Sciences countertop display fridge — all six exterior faces shown unfolded and connected at their shared edges, like a flattened box laid flat on a clean white background.

UNFOLDED CRUCIFORM LAYOUT (the six faces are connected at their edges, sharing thin black die-cut line borders):

          [ TOP ]
[LEFT] [FRONT] [RIGHT] [BACK]
          [BOTTOM]

Each face is rendered as a flat orthographic view of that surface, with the actual finish/printing visible:

• FRONT (large center panel): the glass door — translucent glass framed in white, showing the 'NuLumin / BIO-SCIENCES' logo silkscreened on the glass and the vertical chromatic rainbow accent strip behind. Visible interior product shelves with neat rows of small white branded boxes in two tiers.

• LEFT (panel to the left of FRONT): solid white panel with the full vertical 'NuLumin / BIO-SCIENCES' logo printed centered, plus the vertical chromatic rainbow accent strip.

• RIGHT (panel to the right of FRONT): plain solid white panel with door hinge details visible at the seam.

• BACK (panel furthest right): plain white panel with a small black mesh vent grille in the upper area, and a power-cord exit grommet at the bottom corner.

• TOP (panel above FRONT): plain solid white panel.

• BOTTOM (panel below FRONT): plain solid white panel with four small rubber feet visible at the corners.

The panels are connected at their shared edges by thin precise black DIE-CUT LINES (single hairline, technical drafting style). The proportions of each panel exactly match the fridge dimensions — the FRONT and BACK panels are 16.9" wide × 22.4" tall, the LEFT and RIGHT panels are 16.3" wide × 22.4" tall, the TOP and BOTTOM panels are 16.9" wide × 16.3" tall.

DIMENSION CALLOUTS in clean technical drafting style — thin black lines with arrowheads at both ends, dimension text in small black sans-serif placed outside the unfolded layout:
• '22.4" H' on a vertical dimension line to the right of the unfolded layout, indicating the front panel height.
• '16.9" W' on a horizontal dimension line under the FRONT panel.
• '16.3" D' on a horizontal dimension line under the LEFT panel (or above TOP panel — pick whichever reads cleaner).

FACE LABELS: small clean uppercase sans-serif inside (or directly beside) each panel — 'FRONT', 'BACK', 'LEFT SIDE', 'RIGHT SIDE', 'TOP', 'BOTTOM'.

HEADER (top of canvas, centered, small caps): 'NULUMIN BIO-SCIENCES — DISPLAY FRIDGE / DIELINE'.
FOOTER (bottom of canvas, centered, small caps): 'DIMENSIONS: 16.3" D × 16.9" W × 22.4" H'.

Style: clean industrial dieline / flat-pattern aesthetic, pure white background, photoreal panel renders with the actual finishes/printing/hardware visible, NuLumin brand colors preserved (white body + chromatic rainbow vertical strip), thin black die-cut lines connecting the panels, minimal copy, technical drafting feel. No extraneous text or logos beyond what's specified.
